title: Supervise agricultural crop establishment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise agricultural crop establishment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Source and assess information for input to crop establishment program

pcs.text: Obtain and review crop production plan and related documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and review crop production plan and related documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and review crop production plan and related documentation.

pcs.text: Assess competing demands on human and physical resources affecting crop establishment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess competing demands on human and physical resources affecting crop establishment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess competing demands on human and physical resources affecting crop establishment.

pcs.text: Assess the role of technology in improving efficiencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the role of technology in improving efficiencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the role of technology in improving efficiencies.

pcs.text: Determine specific target area, or paddock, for crop from crop production plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine specific target area, or paddock, for crop from crop production plan.

pcs.text: Review historical records of target area for potential impact on crop establishment program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review historical records of target area for potential impact on crop establishment program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review historical records of target area for potential impact on crop establishment program.

pcs.text: Access and evaluate soil test and results to determine soil treatments for crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and evaluate soil test and results to determine soil treatments for crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and evaluate soil test and results to determine soil treatments for crop.

pcs.text: Assess and account for rubbish levels and crop growing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and account for rubbish levels and crop growing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and account for rubbish levels and crop growing conditions.
